title_en: V-JEPA: Video Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture
title_zh: V-JEPA：视频联合嵌入预测架构
abstract_en: A self-supervised predictive architecture for learning from video without pixel-level generation.
abstract_zh: 一种无需像素级生成、从视频中进行自监督预测学习的架构。
editorial_summary_zh: 代表了视频世界模型中预测式而非重建式的路线。
editorial_summary_en: Represents predictive rather than reconstructive video modeling.
why_it_matters: Important for understanding alternatives to generative video world models.
